# BaliVisaAssist

> Professional visa assistance for Indonesia, operated by CIPTA SOLUSI GLOBAL.

BaliVisaAssist helps foreigners obtain the right visa and permits to live, work, retire, or do business in Indonesia. We are a licensed private visa assistance company based in Canggu, Bali. All final visa decisions are made by Indonesian immigration authorities.

## Services & Pricing (17 services)

### Visas

- B1 Visa (Visa on Arrival): from IDR 845,000. 30 days, extendable to 60 days. Same-day processing.
- C1 Tourist Visa (Single Entry): from IDR 2,300,000. 60 days, extendable to 180 days. 3-5 working days.
- C2 Business Visa (Single Entry): from IDR 4,000,000. 60 days, extendable to 180 days. 3-5 working days.
- C6 Social/Volunteer Visa: from IDR 4,000,000. 60 days, extendable to 180 days. 3-5 working days.
- Bali Tourist Levy: from IDR 250,000. One-time payment per visit. Same day.
- D1 Multi-Entry Tourist Visa: from IDR 6,000,000. 1-2 years, 60 days per entry. 5-7 working days.
- D2 Multi-Entry Business Visa: from IDR 6,000,000. 1-2 years, 60 days per entry. 5-7 working days.
- D12 Visa 1 Year (Pre-Investment): from IDR 7,200,000. 1 year, 180 days per entry. 5 working days.
- D12 Visa 2 Years (Pre-Investment): from IDR 10,300,000. 2 years, 180 days per entry. 5 working days.

### Extensions

- B1 Extension: from IDR 885,000. 30 additional days. 3-5 working days.
- C1 Visa Extension: from IDR 2,250,000. 60 additional days per extension (max 2 extensions). 5-7 working days.
- D12 Visa Extension: from IDR 4,500,000. 180 additional days. 5-7 working days.

### Stay Permits (KITAS)

- Retirement KITAS (E33F): from IDR 7,350,000. 1 year, renewable up to 5 years. 2-4 weeks. Age 60+.
- Remote Worker KITAS (E33G Digital Nomad Visa): from IDR 11,250,000. 1 year, multiple entry. 5-10 working days. Min. USD 60,000/year income.
- Working KITAS (E23 Work Visa): from IDR 15,500,000. 6-12 months, renewable. 2-3 months.
- Investor ITAS (E28A): from IDR 18,500,000. 2 years, renewable. 4-8 weeks.

### Business Setup

- PT PMA Company Setup: from IDR 15,000,000. Full foreign-owned company registration. 4-6 weeks.

## Contact

- Email: info@balivisaassist.com
- WhatsApp: Available on our website
- Office: JL. Pantai Batu Bolong No.38, Canggu, Bali 80363, Indonesia
- Hours: Monday-Friday 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM WITA

## How to Get Started

1. Contact us via WhatsApp or email with your visa needs, nationality, and timeline.
2. We review your eligibility and provide a personalized quote.
3. Submit your documents (passport, photos, supporting documents).
4. We handle the application through official immigration channels.
5. Receive your visa and enter Indonesia.

## Important Notes

- Prices include government fees, processing fees, and service fees.
- Prices may vary by nationality, processing speed, and specific requirements.
- We are not a government agency. Final visa decisions are made by Indonesian immigration.
- Legal entity: CIPTA SOLUSI GLOBAL (NIB: 3001260059407).
- Website: https://balivisaassist.com
